title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 491.310 - Associate circuit judge to issue subpoenas
text:
491.310.  Associate circuit judge to issue subpoenas. — The associate circuit judge shall issue subpoenas for witnesses at the instance of either party, and shall include all the witnesses ordered at the same time by a party in one subpoena.
(RSMo 1939 § 2649, A.L. 1945 p. 765 § 85) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2263; 1919 § 2813; 1909 § 7490
